---

Great salespeople surround themselves with overachievers and greatness and exceptionalism and they make little time for others. That's right. Sounds harsh? It is. Look you want to be great? You got to avoid good. You want to be exceptional? You have to avoid average. You got to stay away from it. You got to treat it like it's the plague. If you want to be a great performer, you have to literally push away average performers and and not accept average performances. Overachievers the greats. They're going to show up early. They're going to stay late. They're going to go the extra mile. They're going to make that extra sales call. They're going to do the things they're uncomfortable with. They're going to organize activities so that they can take advantage of the opportunity to be great. They're going to be relentless with their battle plans and anything average that they're going to puke out. They're going to get rid of. They're going to discard like it's the plague. Be great. Don't be average.
